prompt: I have a dashboard with an OrderSummaryCard component that shows the user's current cart: items (array), subtotal, discount, and total. I don't want Claude to be able to modify the cart at all — I just want it to be able to answer questions like 'what's in my cart?' or 'what's my total?' from the real live data. How do I set this up?

assertions.text: Does NOT define any actions (or passes an empty actions object)
getState returns all four fields: items, subtotal, discount, and total
Explains what Claude will be able to do with the read-only data (answer questions about cart)
Clearly distinguishes read-only from read+write and explains why the developer would choose read-only
